query: Could you help arrange a 5-day travel plan for a group of 7, departing from Omaha and planning to visit 2 cities in Colorado? The trip is set from March 14th to March 18th, 2022. It's vital that our accommodations are pet-friendly, as we have pets with us. Our budget for the entire trip is $23,400.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Omaha to Colorado Springs
plan.attraction: The Broadmoor Seven Falls;Cheyenne Mountain Zoo;Garden of the Gods;
plan.lunch: Raglan Road Irish Pub and Restaurant, Colorado Springs
plan.dinner: Raglan Road Irish Pub and Restaurant, Colorado Springs
plan.accommodation: Large sunny park slope apartment, Colorado Springs

plan.breakfast: Raglan Road Irish Pub and Restaurant, Colorado Springs
plan.attraction: Cave of the Winds Mountain Park;Manitou Cliff Dwellings;Red Rock Canyon Open Space;
plan.lunch: Raglan Road Irish Pub and Restaurant, Colorado Springs

plan.accommodation: Large sunny park slope apartment, Colorado Springs
